checks.title: .cortexa/workspace.json exists
checks.message: .cortexa/workspace.json is missing. workspace config is required by ctx pack and editor integrations.
checks.suggestion: Run ctx setup to initialize workspace metadata.

checks.title: .cortexa/context-manifest.json exists
checks.message: .cortexa/context-manifest.json is missing. manifest records asset ownership and refresh lifecycle.
checks.suggestion: Run ctx setup or ctx update to create context-manifest.json.

checks.title: .cortexa/project-kit.json exists
checks.message: .cortexa/project-kit.json is missing. project kit summarizes generated specs, skills, agents, and layers.
checks.suggestion: Run ctx update to refresh project-kit.json.

checks.title: .cortexa/ownership/ownership-map.json exists
checks.message: .cortexa/ownership/ownership-map.json is missing. ownership map helps bound multi-package tasks.
checks.suggestion: Run ctx setup, then fill ownership-map for important packages.

checks.title: .cortexa/adapters/discovery.json exists
checks.message: .cortexa/adapters/discovery.json is missing. adapter discovery snapshot should track current project shape.
checks.suggestion: Run ctx update to refresh adapter discovery.

checks.title: .cortexa/graphs/repo-graph.json exists
checks.message: .cortexa/graphs/repo-graph.json is missing. repo graph snapshot should track packages, entrypoints, features, and source imports.
checks.suggestion: Run ctx update to refresh repo graph.

checks.suggestion: Run ctx setup or ctx update to create .cortexa/workflows.

recommendations: Run ctx setup to initialize the required Cortexa workspace assets.
Run ctx update after project structure changes to refresh manifest, adapter discovery, and repo graph snapshots.
Fill .cortexa/ownership/ownership-map.json for packages or features that often change.
